channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: HLSL Language Support - Wed Apr 01 02:21:21 UTC 2026
item.description:
Syntax highlighting and DXC validation for HLSL (High Level Shading Language) files. Supports .hlsl, .hlsli, .fx, .fxh file extensions. Additional extensions (.vsh...
vendor: DOCC downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.hlsl.plugin

item.title: Klib Lens - Wed Apr 08 07:31:45 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Benny Huo downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.bennyhuo.kotlin.kliblens
